data.content: Adjusted Queues/Active status dropdown behavior in src/components/filter-bar.tsx: dropdown now falls back to phase default when current state filter is from the other phase, and the phase default option label is now 'All'. Queue/active state options remain phase-specific and workflow-priority sorted. Validation: bun install --frozen-lockfile; bun run lint (warnings only); bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run test (pass); bun run build (fails due pre-existing Next prerender/runtime issue on /beads and /_not-found). Commit pushed to origin/main: f659b88504ae6a9bcac6679ae406e218bf790464.
